description_long: This lantern features a conical, flared body with a smooth, white translucent exterior, accented by four evenly spaced vertical amber or copper-colored strips that run from the top to the base. The top section is capped with a dark, likely metallic or plastic fixture, which serves as the mounting or attachment point. The body appears to be made of frosted or matte glass or acrylic, designed to diffuse light softly and evenly. The vertical strips may serve both as structural reinforcements and decorative elements, giving the lantern a modern yet slightly retro aesthetic. The overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or building entrances. The lantern is likely intended for post or ceiling mounting and is designed to house a single internal light source, probably an LED or electric bulb.
description: A conical, white frosted lantern with vertical amber strips and a dark top cap, designed for urban lighting. The lantern has a modern, streamlined look with decorative vertical accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full conical shape, four vertical amber strips, and the dark top cap.
description_view_1: Side view, nearly identical to the front, with the same vertical strip pattern and top cap visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front and side, with all four vertical strips and the top cap in view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the symmetrical vertical strips and the dark top cap.
